message.content:
[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in Google Trends for car repair searches",
    "family": "consumer_stress",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly data for 'car repair' keyword",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A spike in car repair searches suggests rising consumer stress related to unexpected expenses impacting discretionary spending.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Consumer discretionary spending may get squeezed when repair-related stress increases."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter short XLY when weekly car repair search interest rises over 20% compared to previous 3-week average",
      "exit": "Exit after 3 weeks or when interest drops below 10% increase",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Google Trends weekly keyword interest often shows multiple 20%+ spikes yearly."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Labor job posting drop with rising unemployment claims",
    "family": "labor_jobs",
    "data": {
      "source": "FRED weekly unemployment claims and job postings data",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A simultaneous drop in job postings and rise in unemployment claims signals labor demand weakening rapidly.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLF",
      "rationale": "Financial sector sensitive to labor market stress and potential credit risks."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter short XLF when job postings drop 5% WoW and unemployment claims rise 3% WoW",
      "exit": "Exit after 4 weeks or if either metric reverses by 2%",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 18,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Weekly labor data commonly shows small but meaningful opposite moves during slowdowns."
  },
  {

    },

    },

    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",

  },
